title: selaginella laevigata var. lyallii
intro: Selaginella laevigata var. lyallii, also known as New Zealand spikemoss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its creeping, rhizomatous habit and small, spikemoss-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of New Zealand spikemoss include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
